title: 私を支えるたくさんの

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking through town one day after Satono
Diamond's first G1 victory.

text_block_list.name: Arcade Employee
text_block_list.text:
Our Satono Diamond G1 victory celebration is
underway! Enter the raffle for a chance to win
marvelous prizes! Every customer gets one free
try!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My curiosity piqued by the employee's words, I
enter the arcade. The interior is covered in flashy
decorations, including photos from Satono
Diamond's race.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh! Hello, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hey there! Did you come to play some games
too?
choice_data_list: Actually, I came to check out this event.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask them why this arcade is holding a Satono
Diamond event.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This place offers arcade cabinets developed by
the Satono Group.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
In order to commemorate my G1 victory, events
are being held at the group's partner facilities.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's Satono Group policy to give back to
customers and share the happiness of special
occasions.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure they must have received approval from
the academy too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since the matter is not directly related to racing,
the academy likely handled everything on their
side.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
We're about to go to a diner. Would you like to
come too?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh, yes! Please come with us!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yay! Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Would you mind waiting a moment before we
go?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond speaks to an employee and
hands him an autographed card. She then
proceeds to sign one of the arcade cabinets.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Dia is going around to all the group facilities to
give them autographs to display!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
She came up with the idea herself, with the hope
that visiting customers might enjoy seeing it!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
She obviously can't visit all the facilities across
the country, so she's decided to send out signed
cards stamped with the cleats she wore during the
G1 race instead!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Sorry for the wait. Let's get going, shall we?

text_block_list.name: Dia & Kitasan
text_block_list.text: Three Dia Burgers, please!

text_block_list.name: Diner Staff
text_block_list.text: Coming right up.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. The Dia Burger recipe is actually based on
the hamburger steaks my mom would make for
me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...The day before a race, she'd always step in for
the chefs in the kitchen and make a hamburger
steak for me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
A plump hamburger steak topped with a
diamond-shaped slice of cheese. And she'd stick a
handmade flag in the middle.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
No matter how busy she was with work, my mom
would always take the time to make one. It was
her way of cheering me on.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: That's why it's called a Dia Burger!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Right. I doubt they'll taste exactly like my mom's,
but I'm looking forward to trying one. ♪

text_block_list.name: Diner Staff
text_block_list.text: Thanks for waiting. Here are your Dia Burgers.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Wow, they're finally ready! Let's dig in!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch... Mmm!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This tastes almost exactly like my mom's! I love
how tender it is—it practically melts in your
mouth!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. She must have had direct input on the
recipe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Dia Burger definitely has a considerable
home-cooked feel to it for something on a diner
menu.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Considering all of these grand events they're
holding, your parents must be over the moon
about your first G1 victory.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... They did call to congratulate me, but it
was a pretty normal conversation. They seemed
rather busy with work.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh, really?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
They did say they'd celebrate with me the next
time I returned home, though.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Can you two still fit more in your stomachs?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
A cafe run by the group is having a cake event to
commemorate my G1 win.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Let's go there for dessert! ♪ And later we can go
to our indoor amusement park, where all the rides
are currently free.
choice_data_list: Is this why your parents were busy?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
They were probably running around preparing all
these commemoration events.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Don't tell me there are special events at all the group's facilities...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and one-night reservations made at the
Satono Resort Hotel today are only 500 yen.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You might want to take advantage of that deal,
Trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: They really are holding events everywhere!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The scale of this celebration is extraordinary. You
can really tell how thrilled both Satono Diamond's
parents and the rest of her family are.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond's G1 triumph—a first for the
Satono family—was a great achievement and has
brought joy to countless people.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hope we continue to achieve many victories
together.
